scope_results.risk: screen glass, adhesive, and display stack must not clash with molded orange rails or ledges
routed board components must clear enclosure ribs, bosses, snaps, and side rails
USB-C shell, aperture, saddle, drip lip, and gaskets must remain interference-free through insertion travel
button caps, gaskets, rails, and switch keepouts must not bind or preload
under-glass camera and handset acoustic path must clear each other and the cover glass
rear camera module, cover window, adhesive, baffles, and the adjacent flash window must remain interference-free
rear torch LED must sit buried behind the back wall, its window must register in the back shell, and it must not clash with the adjacent camera or PCB
battery, split interconnect, haptic, and PCB islands must not pinch or overlap
speaker, microphone, meshes, and acoustic ports must not clash with USB or enclosure plastic
RF shields, feed regions, and antenna plastic windows must preserve keepouts
screw bosses, snap hooks, service tray, and service label recess must not intrude into assemblies

scope_results_full.risk: screen glass, adhesive, and display stack must not clash with molded orange rails or ledges
routed board components must clear enclosure ribs, bosses, snaps, and side rails
USB-C shell, aperture, saddle, drip lip, and gaskets must remain interference-free through insertion travel
button caps, gaskets, rails, and switch keepouts must not bind or preload
under-glass camera and handset acoustic path must clear each other and the cover glass
rear camera module, cover window, adhesive, baffles, and the adjacent flash window must remain interference-free
rear torch LED must sit buried behind the back wall, its window must register in the back shell, and it must not clash with the adjacent camera or PCB
battery, split interconnect, haptic, and PCB islands must not pinch or overlap
speaker, microphone, meshes, and acoustic ports must not clash with USB or enclosure plastic
RF shields, feed regions, and antenna plastic windows must preserve keepouts
screw bosses, snap hooks, service tray, and service label recess must not intrude into assemblies

flush_back_check.risk: no solid exterior part may extend beyond the flat back outer plane

rear_camera_back_shell_hole_check.risk: rear camera/window stack must pass through a real back-shell hole without colliding with orange plastic

rear_flash_back_shell_hole_check.risk: rear flash light-pipe window must pass through a real back-shell hole without colliding with orange plastic

handset_cover_glass_slot_check.risk: handset acoustic slot must be a real cover-glass opening, not a visual marker colliding with glass
